label: Path grid
description: Defines a pathfinding grid variant used by the RimWorld movement system. Each variant controls which terrain and structures pawns can traverse.

workerType.label: Worker type
workerType.description: The PathGrid subclass to instantiate for this grid variant; the game validates at startup that the named class is a subclass of PathGrid.

fencePassable.label: Fence passable
fencePassable.description: When true, units using this path grid can pass through fence-type buildings; the shipped Normal grid explicitly sets this to true, while FenceBlocked leaves it at false.

flying.label: Flying
flying.description: When true, this grid is for flying-movement units that ignore terrain costs and fence obstacles.
